channel.description: Recent content in Game on Liva | Personal blog template

item.title: How To write better code
item.description: Steps to better code A guide for beginners This is an early version of a chapter from Your First Year in Code, a book of practical how-to and advice for new developers.

item.title: Using CameraX Exposure Compensation API
item.description: Camera devices are crucial in driving innovation on mobile devices, and camera exposure is a key element for obtaining a camera image with exceptional quality.

item.title: Using CameraX Exposure Compensation API
item.description: Camera devices are crucial in driving innovation on mobile devices, and camera exposure is a key element for obtaining a camera image with exceptional quality.
